introSection: Montaña Rusa Infantil is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Spanish manufacturer Robles Bouso Atracciones currently located at Tivoli World in Benalmádena, Málaga, Andalusia, Spain.
fullText: Montaña Rusa Infantil is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Spanish manufacturer Robles Bouso Atracciones currently located at Tivoli World in Benalmádena, Málaga, Andalusia, Spain.
